name: Angel Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 package (2-ounce) whipped dessert topping mix (such as Dreamwhip)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed vanilla wafers, melted butter, and 1/4 teaspoon ground nutmeg in a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a saucepan, combine the unflavored gelatin, granulated sugar, salt, and 1 1/4 cups water. Cook over low heat, stirring until the gelatin dissolves.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly in the refrigerator.
5. Add the egg whites, lemon juice, and vanilla to the cooled gelatin mixture. Beat until very fluffy, about 5 minutes.
6. Prepare the whipped dessert topping mix according to the package directions.
7. Gently fold the prepared topping mix into the gelatin mixture, along with the sour cream.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared springform pan and spread evenly.
9. Sprinkle additional ground nutmeg over the top.
10. Chill in the refrigerator until firm. Yield: 12 servings.
